titleStmt.title: SII 10.435: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 435. (A.R. No. 801 of 1922.) ON THE FOUR FACES OF A GARUḌA-PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF SĪTĀRĀMASVĀMI, GANIKAPŪḌI, BAPATLA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1197. (Yuva)

summary.p: States that Goḍla Nārāyaṇadāsa and Goḍla-Gōpāladāsa made a gift of the village of Ganakepāḍu to the temple of Bhāvanārāyaṇadēva of Gōshṭīvana with the consent of all the learned men of the village. Gives also a list of several gifts of land made by other persons to the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Anāmatarūyū
dhasya tuṁggabhadrana
dītaṭē yēta trailō
kyanādhasya bhāvasya
garuḍāṁccitaṁ .
bhāvanārāyaṇa
ṁ dēvaṁ bhaktabrāhma
ṇasākṣikaṁ . gōṣṭī
vanē muni [¨rvī]rai ssēvya
māna mupāsmahē .
svastiśrī śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1197 Agu
nēṁṭi yuvasaṁvatsara
caitra śuddha 1 guruvā
ramunāṁḍu śrīgō
ṣṭīvananāthuṁ ḍaina bhā
vanārāyaṇadēva
raku havibalā¨rccana
lakūnu śāstrā¨rtthamai
na vaiśākhamahōtsa
vamunakūnuṁ gānu ga
nakepāḍu Āyūri A
śēṣavidvanmahājanāla
cēta yenumaṁdala
balaṁjagoḍlanārā
yaṇadānulūnu
vāri tamuṁḍu go
ḍlagōpāḷadānulū

talli taṁḍrulaku
ṁ buṇyamugānu
bhāvanārāyaṇa
dēvaraku dhārāpū
¨rvvakamu sēsi Icciri
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu
gānu . grāmamadhyē
pū¨rvvahnē jñātisā
maṁtasannidhau hira
ṇyōdakadānēna ṣa[¨rbbē ?]
mēdini gacchati . I
tyādipramāṇamu
tōṁ gūḍa bhāvanā
rāyaṇadēvaraku
dhārāpū¨rvvakamu
sesi Icciri Aśēṣamu
nnu grihakṣētrasahita
mugāna sōmayādula
maṁcaṁgāru Iccina vrittu
lu nālgu mukkā nā
lapeddi Iccina vrittulu 4 .
tallepeddi Iccina vrittulu 5 .
Annimaṁcci Iccina vrittulu 3
rēcirāju Iccina vritti 1 .
maldēvarāju Iccina vritti 1
va ribramarāju Iccina vri
ttulu 3 bhaṁḍāripallipu
ruṣōttamadāsulu Iccina
vritti 1 bopparāju Icci
na vritti 1 pāldēvaṁḍu I
ccina vritti 1 peruḍeppi pe
rumāḍipeddi Icci
na vrittulu 3 mutta
nappana Iccina vrittu
lu 3 ciṁdevāḍi pōta
rāju Iccina vrittu
lu 4 pinapōtarāju
Iccina vrittulu
3 dāṁṭlapōtarāju
Iccina vrittulu 2 ...
Eḍuva AnneAppana
Iccina vri

mallegōpāḷuni Iccina vri
ttulu 3 Aruvanāgadēvape
ddi Iccina vrittulu 3 . sa
¨rvvadēvaAppana Iccina vri
ttulu 2 . kaḍipeddi Icci
na vrittulu 2 veṁḍitī
vebrammarāju Iccina
vrittu 2 . vaṁbrōlūrikēśa
vapeddi Iccina vritti 1 bhā
nemaṁcci Iccina vritti .
Amarepeddi Iccina vritti .
siṁhagiridāsula Icci
na vritti . taṁba Icina
vritti 1 ... nētimaṁccena
Iccina vrittulu 6 . bhā
nemaṁcci Iccina vri
tti . gōviṁddakuciṁgāri
perumāṁḍipeddi Icina
vritti 1

svadattaṁ paradatta va
yō harēta vasuṁddharā
ṣaṣṭi ¨rvvaruṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi
